items.title: Export global delivery terms list from Dynamics
items.description: Export the complete global delivery terms list with descriptions from Dynamics and share for review. Needed to standardize terms, remove unused ones, and align with actual shipment usage across legal entities.

items.title: Add carrier charges and carrier name fields to ticket
items.description: Document requirements in the existing ticket for new custom fields to store carrier charges and carrier name from the shipping integration, ensuring values flow through to invoices and reports.

items.title: Add markup parameter and security controls to ticket
items.description: Add requirements to the existing ticket for a default markup percentage parameter (per legal entity) and manager-only edit rights for markup and total charges fields in both the shipping rate window and Maintain Charges.

items.title: Review technical approach with developer
items.description: Satbere to walk through technical impact with the developer — tables affected, required privileges, and data flow from shipping integration to sales order and invoice — and report back with feasibility and effort estimate.

items.title: Confirm priority order of changes within ticket
items.description: Agree on the sequence of development work within the existing ticket — markup parameterization, security controls, and carrier charges fields — before handing off to the developer to start.

items.title: Meet with divisional leaders on delivery terms cleanup
items.description: Alan to meet with divisional leaders to discuss which delivery terms to keep or remove, then finalize the cleanup list in Dynamics based on exported terms and actual usage data.

items.title: Schedule and hold cycle counts follow-up session
items.description: Alan to send a calendar invite for a separate session focused on cycle counts. Agreed at the end of the April 14 meeting as a distinct follow-up.

decisions.description: Where exactly will carrier charges and carrier name fields be stored, and how will they flow from the shipping integration through to the sales order and invoice for consistent reporting?
What is the granularity of the markup parameter — legal entity only for now, or should it support future per-carrier or per-division overrides to avoid rework later?
Which roles and privileges will control editing of markup and total charges fields in the shipping rate window and Maintain Charges, and how will existing users be handled?
What are the Power BI reporting requirements — field names, data sources, and delta calculation logic between carrier charges and customer charges — to be confirmed before development starts?
Which delivery terms will be kept vs. removed after the divisional leaders meeting, and what is the plan for historical data cleanup including impact on existing records?
